text_block_list.text: Hahaha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My friend has always been by my side, ever since I
was a child. Always...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Watching from behind as she runs, I'm reminded
of myself...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen her face. She's always ahead of
me. And I can never catch up, no matter how hard
I try...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
We talk all the time, but... there's one question I
could never bring myself to ask.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Who...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Who are you?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer... good morning.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Let's continue training... So someday, my dream
will...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Manhattan Cafe, my trainee. Her dream is
a little on the strange side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In her own words...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I can... see things. Things others can't. Mysterious
and wondrous beings...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But... no one would believe me when I told them
that.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So, when I was still little... I withdrew into my
shell... to keep the things important to me out of
harm's way.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But one day, I saw a girl running. From behind,
she looked very much like me.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't see her face, but she seemed to be
having so much fun. I became so... envious... of
her.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I want to catch up to her. I want to run with her,
side by side.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Do you think I'll be able to catch up to her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll catch up, and overtake her. That's the
promise we made when we sealed our training
contract.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't see her friend for myself. But I still chose to
believe her and made that contract.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because I sensed incredible potential in her
running ability. And also...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Wait for me, okay? One day... I'll catch up to
you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I felt that she was at risk. That without the right
support, she would be consumed by a deep
darkness...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm mulling over these thoughts, when...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh? I know this voice...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My friend is calling out to me. She's saying... to
go this way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump, thump, thump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up at a racecourse. Perfectly still,
Manhattan Cafe gazes at the track.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's her... She's running... and she's in the lead, way
out in front...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She's waiting... for me... Do you know how I can
enter this race?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Debut... in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And if I finish in first... and keep winning, my
friend will be in reach...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Can I, Trainer? I really... really want to enter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the time has finally come for
Manhattan Cafe to take the stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her friend currently stands at the summit of the
Twinkle Series. If Manhattan Cafe can scale that
peak too, perhaps true bliss awaits her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, well. If it isn't Cafe and her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Striking up a conversation with us is Agnes
Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's an Umamusume researcher famous
throughout the academy for her devotion to the
realm of possibility and something of a mad
scientist.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her research lab also happens to be an unused
classroom she shares with Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The student council initially gave Manhattan Cafe
permission to borrow the classroom and use it to
store her hobby paraphernalia.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But later on, Agnes Tachyon demanded that the
student council give her a laboratory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deciding that a troublemaker like her needed
supervision, they approved her request on the
condition that she share the room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how half the classroom came to serve
as Agnes Tachyon's research lab.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe continues to use the other half
of the room to store her things, with the added
caveat of having to watch over Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Can we help you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, why so cold? We have our fair share of
commonalities, you know.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Cafe. Your goal is to pursue an imaginary
friend—a difficult goal indeed for any ordinary
person to understand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My goal, on the other hand, is to transcend the
very limits of Horsegirl-kind. That matters more to me
than even victory.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What a strange and peculiar pair we make,
wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You don't seem especially pleased about that...
but you will be seeing me more and more often.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We're peers now. Since you've decided to debut
in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look over there. That's Agnes Tachyon,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, she's planning to debut this year. News is that she's super fast.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...You too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've heard the rumors. They say Agnes Tachyon is
extraordinarily gifted, and she produces perfect
results no matter what she does.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe might have hidden potential, but
for now there's no comparison between her
running and Tachyon's.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
See you around, Cafe. Cheers to our future. I'm
expecting great things from you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Not the same things as from me, of course.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Not... the same things?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After sharing a few cryptic words, Agnes Tachyon
departs. As I ponder their meaning...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Let's not worry about her. We have a more
important goal...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Catching up to my friend. Nothing else matters...
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's Manhattan Cafe. She's no ordinary
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The dream she's chasing is steeped in mystery,
veiled in mist. And I'm going to navigate it with
her.
